---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

## 📝 Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 🚀 Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## 📋 Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## 📸 Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## 💻 Environment Info
- OS: [e.g. macOS, Windows]
- Python Version: [e.g. 3.11]
- Library Versions: [e.g. pandas==2.0.0]

## 📝 Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here (e.g., full error logs).
